Re-enabled OSR with LoopDepth>=2 gate. mandelbrot -80%, spectral_norm -64%, matmul -29%, fannkuch -16%. mandelbrot now 1.27x from LuaJIT.
Load Elimination (GetField CSE) + TypeFloat guard fix. nbody -26%, broad 17-49% across GetField-heavy benchmarks. Compound effects dominated instruction-count predictions.
GETFIELD feedback in Go exit handlers + shape guard dedup. nbody -8.3%, table_field_access -23.5%, spectral_norm -8.7%. Evaluator caught OpSetTable invalidation bug, fixed.
LICM GetField hoisting + store-to-load forwarding. Infra landed but nbody unchanged: inner loop SetField on same objects blocks hoisting. S2L forwarding subsumed by existing CSE.

Production typing diagnostic confirms Scenario A (feedback works). R(0) pin to X22 + NaN-boxed closure cache in X21. nbody -8.1%, broad 8-23% across 18/22 benchmarks from slot-0 register pinning. No regressions >=5%.
Float param guards + GuardType CSE + LICM whitelist. nbody -10%, spectral -9%, table_field -17%. Bugfix: mixed int/float exclusion.

Guard hoisting in LICM (OpGuardType) + cross-block shape/table verification (single-predecessor). A/B confirmed zero wall-time change. Dominator approach unsound at merge points. ackermann -5.2%, fib -4.3%. mutual_recursion +4.9% regression (guard overhead > body saving on small protos). Forward KnownInt analysis + int-specialized ADD/SUB/MUL/EQ/LT/LE templates. Evaluator PASS. Pre-existing flaky crash in TestDeepRecursionRegression confirmed pre-existing.

Harness repair round. Median-of-N runner (run_all.sh). Re-baseline with median-of-5 (dc2465d). Confirmed R24 wins: ackermann -6.2%, fib -5.0%. Phantom fibonacci_iterative +10.5% regression was single-shot noise (0.67sigma). Stretch: int-spec overflow deopt resumes at guard PC via vm.ResumeFromPC — prevents side-effect replay (5b4741b). Pre-existing TestDeepRecursion JIT crash discovered and logged.

Go goroutines start at 8KB stack; JIT native blobs cannot call morestack. NativeCallDepth=48 is goroutine-stack budget constraint. SP-floor approach underflows address space. Task 0 (insn-count fixture) committed at 878e64a. Tasks 1-3 aborted.
